result.stdout:
Changey 0.4.1
Copyright (C) 2026 TheSylence

  init         Create a new changelog

  release      Marks the latest unreleased version as released

  yank         Yanks the latest released version in the changelog

  add          Adds a new change to the 'Added' section of the current
               unreleased version

  change       Adds a new change to the 'Changed' section of the current
               unreleased version

  deprecate    Adds a new change to the 'Deprecated' section of the current
               unreleased version

  fix          Adds a new change to the 'Fixed' section of the current
               unreleased version

  remove       Adds a new change to the 'Removed' section of the current
               unreleased version

  security     Adds a new change to the 'Security' section of the current
               unreleased version

  extract      Extract changes for a single version from a changelog

  compare      Generate compare URLs for all version found in the changelog.
               This will overwrite any previous compare URLs.

  help         Display more information on a specific command.

  version      Display version information.

Copyright (C) 2026 TheSylence

  init         Create a new changelog

  release      Marks the latest unreleased version as released

  yank         Yanks the latest released version in the changelog

  add          Adds a new change to the 'Added' section of the current
               unreleased version

  change       Adds a new change to the 'Changed' section of the current
               unreleased version

  deprecate    Adds a new change to the 'Deprecated' section of the current

  fix          Adds a new change to the 'Fixed' section of the current

  remove       Adds a new change to the 'Removed' section of the current

  security     Adds a new change to the 'Security' section of the current

  extract      Extract changes for a single version from a changelog

  compare      Generate compare URLs for all version found in the changelog.
               This will overwrite any previous compare URLs.

  help         Display more information on a specific command.

  version      Display version information.

result.stdout:
Changey 0.4.1
Copyright (C) 2026 TheSylence
USAGE:
Generate compare links for a project hosted on github.:
  changey compare -b github.com/org/repo
Generate compare links for a project hosted on gitlab.:
  changey compare -b gitlab.com/org/repo
Specify templates when project is hosted elsewhere.:
  changey compare -b example.com/git -c
  %URL%/compare/%NEW_VERSION%/%OLD_VERSION% -r %URL%/releases/%VERSION%

  -b           Required. Base url for generated links. When using github.com or
               gitlab.com release and compare templates are automatically
               determined.

  -c           Template for an URL that compares two tags. Only needed when
               using an unknown base url.

  -r           Template for an URL that directly links to a release. Only needed
               when using an unknown base url.

  -p           (Default: changelog.md) Path to the changelog file that will be
               created

  -s           (Default: false) Disable log output completely

  -v           (Default: false) Enable verbose log output

  --help       Display this help screen.

  --version    Display version information.

result.stdout:
Changey 0.4.1
Copyright (C) 2026 TheSylence
USAGE:
Extract all changes for version 1.2.3 and store them in a file called
version.md:
  changey extract -t version.md 1.2.3
Extract all changes for version 1.1 into a file called 1.1.md and include the
version header:
  changey extract -h -t 1.1.md 1.1

  -h                  (Default: false) Include header from version in extracted
                      file

  -t                  Required. Target file to extract changes to

  -p                  (Default: changelog.md) Path to the changelog file that
                      will be created

  -s                  (Default: false) Disable log output completely

  -v                  (Default: false) Enable verbose log output

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.

  Version (pos. 0)    Required. Version to extract changes for

result.stdout:
Changey 0.4.1
Copyright (C) 2026 TheSylence
USAGE:
Initialize an new changelog at ./changelog.md:
  changey init
Initialize a new changelog at ./changes.md:
  changey init -p changes.md
Initialize a changelog at ./changes.md and overwrite if it already exists:
  changey init -o -p changes.md
Initialize a new changelog but omit semver compliance information:
  changey init --semver

  -o           (Default: false) Indicates whether an existing changelog should
               be overwritten

  --semver     (Default: true) Indicates the project uses semver

  -p           (Default: changelog.md) Path to the changelog file that will be
               created

  -s           (Default: false) Disable log output completely

  -v           (Default: false) Enable verbose log output

  --help       Display this help screen.

  --version    Display version information.

USAGE:
Initialize an new changelog at ./changelog.md:

Initialize a new changelog at ./changes.md:

Initialize a changelog at ./changes.md and overwrite if it already exists:
  changey init -o -p changes.md
Initialize a new changelog but omit semver compliance information:
  changey init --semver

  -o           (Default: false) Indicates whether an existing changelog should

  --semver     (Default: true) Indicates the project uses semver

result.stdout:
Changey 0.4.1
Copyright (C) 2026 TheSylence
USAGE:
Mark the current version as released today with version 1.2.3:
  changey release 1.2.3
Mark the current version as 1.0 released on May 4, 2009:
  changey release -d 2005-05-04 1.0

  -d               The date to use for this release. If omitted the current date
                   will be used

  -f               (Default: false) Force release even if version is older than
                   already released versions

  -p               (Default: changelog.md) Path to the changelog file that will
                   be created

  -s               (Default: false) Disable log output completely

  -v               (Default: false) Enable verbose log output

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.

  Name (pos. 0)    Required. Name of the version to release.
